text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Look at this, Maruzen! There's a new<n>
announcement on the bulletin board!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Everyone just keeps achieving more and<n>more...
It's like they say, "In the ground<n>carrots lie, but
their leaves always reach<n>for the sky"!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... the runners at this academy truly<n>are the
best of the best...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You have the potential to fill up this<n>whole board
by yourself with your<n>achievements, you know?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: No, I mean it. I truly believe you can do<n>it!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hold your head up high, Chiyo! You've<n>got a
promising future ahead of you, and<n>you're cute to
boot!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh?! D-do you really think I'm... cute?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, even that was cute! And don't you<n>forget...
I believe in you.
